mapper.select: SELECT `user`.user_id, `user`.user_name, `user`.nick_name, `user`.email, `user`.phonenumber, `user`.avatar, `user`.login_date, role.role_name FROM sys_user AS `user` JOIN sys_user_role AS ur ON user.user_id=ur.user_id JOIN sys_role AS role ON role.role_id=ur.role_id WHERE user.user_id=#{userId}
